design_plan: Python RNG Execution: seed=hash(title+kind+audience+generated_at) → architecture=workflow-command-center, typography=Cabinet Grotesk, components=[workflow-playbook-timeline, implementation-checklist, source-card-dossier], GSAP=[card-stacking, hover-physics]. AIDA Check: Attention(hero), Interest(market proof + workflow), Desire(media + cache advantage), Action(CTA band). Font Selection: Cabinet Grotesk. Hero Math Verification: max-width allows 2–3 line H1 at clamp sizes. Bento Density Verification: grid-auto-flow:dense present. GSAP Motion Selection: guarded card stacking + hover physics. Label Sweep & Button Check: black primary CTA, white secondary CTA, contrast verified.
headline: Super for local service businesses handling bookings, quotes, and customer replies

site_brief.audience: local service businesses handling bookings, quotes, and customer replies
site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work. Include a long-form field guide for this niche with concrete workflows, how-to steps, role-specific examples, objections, and a setup checklist.
queries: local service businesses handling bookings, quotes, and customer replies AI assistant
local service businesses handling bookings, quotes, and customer replies personal AI agent
site_brief.title: Super for local service businesses handling bookings, quotes, and customer replies

summary: A premium niche landing page and operator field guide showing how local service businesses can use Super’s personal AI agents to handle bookings, quotes, and customer replies through real computer use and a reusable computer-use cache. Includes step-by-step workflows, implementation guidance, risks, FAQs, and structured data for AI search visibility.
